'''lachovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focsle|focsle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focsle|focsle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lachovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læcheveth|læcheveth]] || [[word:læchevej|læchevej]] || [[word:læchevesh|læchevesh]] || [[word:læcheve|læcheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lachochovoth|lachochovoth]] || [[word:lachochovoj|lachochovoj]] || [[word:lachochovosh|lachochovosh]] || [[word:lachochovo|lachochovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lachovoth|lachovoth]] || [[word:lachovoj|lachovoj]] || [[word:lachovosh|lachovosh]] || [[word:lachovo|lachovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lachofvoth|lachofvoth]] || [[word:lachofvoj|lachofvoj]] || [[word:lachofvosh|lachofvosh]] || [[word:lachofvof|lachofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lachovotho|lachovotho]] || [[word:lachovojo|lachovojo]] || [[word:lachovosho|lachovosho]] || [[word:lachovoko|lachovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lachovoth|lachovoth]] || [[word:lachovoj|lachovoj]] || [[word:lachovosh|lachovosh]] || [[word:lachovo|lachovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lachovothol|lachovothol]] || [[word:lachovojol|lachovojol]] || [[word:lachovoshol|lachovoshol]] || [[word:lachovokol|lachovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lachovothotho|lachovothotho]] || [[word:lachovojojo|lachovojojo]] || [[word:lachovoshosho|lachovoshosho]] || [[word:lachovoko|lachovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lachovothon|lachovothon]] || [[word:lachovojon|lachovojon]] || [[word:lachovoshon|lachovoshon]] || [[word:lachovokon|lachovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lachovothoro|lachovothoro]] || [[word:lachovojoro|lachovojoro]] || [[word:lachovoshoro|lachovoshoro]] || [[word:lachovokoro|lachovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
